negative_cases.why_wrong: DC Aware ADC3bit: forces every output bit low, so only zero-code smoke checks can pass.
DC Aware ADC3bit: uses seven bins instead of eight, shifting the ADC transition thresholds.
DC Aware ADC3bit: drives the right three logic values in reversed MSB/LSB order.
DC Aware ADC3bit: does not clip out-of-range inputs before quantization.
DC Aware ADC3bit: rounds to the nearest code rather than using the required bin-floor quantizer.
